chunks.text: Ruzena Bajcsy named Signatures Innovation Fellow - EECS at Berkeley Prof. Ruzena Bajcsy and her team have been selected for a 2016-17 award from the Signatures Innovation Fellow Program . This program supports innovative research by UC Berkeley faculty on projects that hold commercial promise and supports visionary faculty entrepreneurs and leadership teams on their journey to building great companies. Prof. Bajcsy’s project is Individualized Human Modeling for Medical Diagnosis and Prescription of Assistive Devices. Categories Entrepreneurship Faculty Honors View Open Faculty Positions
